title: Tata Housing is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Tata Housing is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Tata Housing has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Tata Housing:
Tata Housing is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing!
